title: Raw HTML <form> in frontend template instead of {form_start}
description: A frontend Smarty template uses a raw <form> tag with a hardcoded action URL instead of CMSMS's {form_start} which handles routing, CSRF tokens, and hidden fields. Admin templates are excluded because the admin framework provides its own form handling.
explanation: Raw <form> tags bypass CMSMS's action routing and CSRF protection. {form_start} automatically includes the module action, return ID, and CSRF token.
